name: kotlin-multiplatform
description: Kotlin Multiplatform development, migration, Gradle diagnosis, Compose Multiplatform, interop, testing, data, governance, performance, security, publishing, and production readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Build, migrate, debug, and verify Kotlin Multiplatform projects.
interface.longDescription: A source-backed Kotlin Multiplatform capability pack for Gradle and source-set diagnosis, Android-KMP and AGP migration, Compose Multiplatform UI, iOS interoperability, CocoaPods to SwiftPM migration, CI, testing, performance, observability, security, privacy, publishing, and production readiness.
capabilities: Kotlin Multiplatform architecture and source-set design
Gradle, KGP, AGP, Compose Multiplatform configuration diagnosis
Android-KMP plugin and AGP 9 migration guidance
Compose Multiplatform UI and resource guardrails
iOS framework, cinterop, CocoaPods, and SwiftPM migration guidance
KMP testing, CI, and release verification
Build governance, convention plugin, version catalog, and module API hygiene
Swift API readiness, SKIE, NativeCoroutines, KDoctor, Klibs, and ABI validation guidance
KMP data-layer, offline-first, and source-of-truth review
Production readiness scorecards across architecture, tests, security, performance, interop, and release
KMP performance and observability diagnostics for Gradle, Kotlin/Native, Compose, binaries, and runtime logs
KMP security and privacy review for secure storage, tokens, logs, networking, and platform boundaries
KMP CI and publishing runbooks for Maven, XCFramework, SwiftPM, KMMBridge, app-store boundaries, and release gates
KMP ecosystem selection for persistence, networking, DI, navigation, logging, observability, testing, resources, docs, and monetization
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me build or fix a Kotlin Multiplatform project.
